apps/server-gateway/src/creation/creation.service.ts (+280行: 3导出接口 CreationListItem/CursorPageInfo/CreationListResponse + L0 listCreations主编排 + L1 resolveListDefaults + L2 buildListFilter + L4 mapToCreationListItem + L5 buildPageInfo)

apps/server-gateway/src/creation/creation.controller.ts (+163行: @Get()端点 + 7个@ApiQuery + @ApiOkResponse/@ApiBadRequestResponse/@ApiInternalServerErrorResponse + trace_id注入 + buildApiErrorResponse统一包装)
atomic_functions_completed: J1 findCreationsPaginated (Repository: Prisma creation.findMany where+orderBy createdAt DESC/id DESC + take limit+1 cursor/skip + count非阻断 -1降级 + has_more截断 + encodeCursor next_cursor)
K0 encodeCreationCursor (Repository: {v: item.createdAt.toISOString(), i: item.id} → Buffer base64url)
K1 decodeCreationCursor (Repository: base64url解码→JSON.parse→校验i/v字段存在性→任一失败logger.warn+return null降级首页)
L1 resolveListDefaults (Service: productId非空+trim校验→INVALID_REQUEST 400 / limit整数1~100→INVALID_REQUEST 400 / 默认limit=20)

L2 buildListFilter (Service: status∈VALID_CREATION_STATUSES/current_stage∈VALID_CREATION_STAGES/engine_mode=SCRIPT_DRIVEN/export_format∈MP4|MOV|WEBM → 非法值INVALID_REQUEST 400 + details内含field+received)
L4 mapToCreationListItem (Service: Prisma camelCase→API snake_case 全19字段映射, BigInt→Number, Date→ISO8601, null保留, 不含shot_renders)
L5 buildPageInfo (Service: 纯组装 {cursor, has_more, total_count})
error_codes_covered: INVALID_REQUEST (400, non-retryable, product_id缺失/空/null/undefined / limit=0/-1/101/2.5 / status非法 / current_stage非法 / engine_mode非法 / export_format非法 → details含field+received精确定位)
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR (500, retryable, Prisma P1001/P1017/P2024/P2028/INIT_ERROR/RUST_PANIC/P9999/原生Error — findMany全链路覆盖)
key_design_decisions: 排序固定 createdAt DESC + id DESC (tie-breaker), 不暴露sort_by/sort_order参数
列表项仅含19字段不含shot_renders (详情接口才返回完整ShotRender子表)
product_id不做存在性校验, 仅WHERE过滤 (无匹配返回空列表 items=[])
Cursor格式沿用Material模块: {v: ISO8601, i: UUID} base64url, 不另创格式
Prisma count失败非阻断: 退化为total_count=-1不中断主流程
零新增ErrorCode: INVALID_REQUEST/INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR全部复用已有枚举
常量集中化: CREATION_LIST_DEFAULTS + CREATION_LIST_ERROR_MESSAGES模板化文案
